mechanism_narrative: A high and rising federal funds rate increases equity discount rates and raises the opportunity cost of holding stocks, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the policy-rate trend is upward.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month changes in FEDFUNDS are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward observations or if rolling 3-year Rank IC is greater than -0.03.

mechanism_narrative: An upside acceleration in retail sales signals stronger near-term nominal revenue growth for listed firms, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days after sales momentum crosses into expansion.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered RSAFS accelerations do not produce average 20-day S&P 500 returns above the unconditional average, or if the triggered hit rate for positive returns is below 50% over a 3-year walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in unemployment signals deterioration in household income and recession risk, leading investors to mark down expected earnings and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above its trailing 12-month low by more than 0.5 percentage points
failure_condition: Reject if, after the unemployment trigger fires, average 60-day S&P 500 returns are positive and not below the unconditional average, or if downside classification precision is below 50% in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Sticky inflation combined with an already high policy rate signals that monetary restraint will persist, compressing valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days around inflation-sensitive repricing.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth crosses above 3.0% while FEDFUNDS is above 4.0%
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-inflation and high-rate trigger is followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered cases or if the interaction term has no negative incremental predictive value versus the single proxies.

mechanism_narrative: Positive momentum in industrial production signals improving real activity and operating leverage for cyclical firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days when production growth is sustained.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO momentum has a nonpositive average 60-day forward S&P 500 return or if rolling 3-year Rank IC falls below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A breakdown in housing starts signals weaker interest-sensitive demand and future construction activity, reducing expected cyclical earnings and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its trailing 6-month average by more than 10%
failure_condition: Reject if triggered housing-start breakdowns are followed by 60-day S&P 500 returns above the unconditional average in walk-forward testing or if downside hit rate is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth together with low unemployment signals a soft-landing labor backdrop in which income growth supports consumption without immediate recession stress, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average change exceeds +150 thousand while UNRATE is at or below 4.2%
regime_hint: soft-landing expansion with resilient labor income
failure_condition: Reject if the joint payroll-and-unemployment trigger does not outperform either single-series signal, or if triggered 20-day S&P 500 returns are positive in fewer than 55% of walk-forward instances.

mechanism_narrative: A material deceleration in real GDP growth signals weakening aggregate demand and downward earnings revisions, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days when new GDP information confirms a slowdown.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarterly annualized growth crosses below +1.0%
failure_condition: Reject if GDP-growth slowdown triggers are followed by nonnegative average 5-day S&P 500 returns or if the event-study return around triggered observations is not below baseline at p <= 0.10.
